manifest.description: The dataset manifest should be a file containing a JSON object with attributes 'train' and 'test', each of which should be a list of objects with properties 'points' (list of [x1,y1,x2,y2], containing integer representations of starting point and second point which signifies direction) and 'image_path' (relative to the manifest file).

width.description: Width to transform image to (should be divisible by 32).

height.description: Height to transform image to (should be divisible by 32).

epochs.description: Number of epochs to train for.
